creator: ladyandhersweetescapes
caption:
@wavebreaker_jbr has a new sunset deck by the beach and it’s stunning! 💙

🏖️ Wooden patio with gorgeous beach and Ain Dubai views 
🌅 Perfect for romantic sunset dates and fun catch up sessions with friends 
🎶 Lively beach bar ambience 
🍹Great sundowners offers; drinks at 38 AED onwards and sharing platters (charcuterie board) at 85 AED.

Tag your date. 💕

transcription.text: Listen to my heart beat, beat, beat Saying do you love me, me, me But I'm running away So I put you in a song Beside my heart beat, beat
